items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.0.0-Beta-9 Available
items.message:
v3.0.0-Beta-9 is now available in pre-releases.

This update fixes a crash that could occur when update_all triggered a MiSTer reboot.

Profile handling when using Scan Network has also been improved. The correct profile is now loaded when a scanned IP matches a saved device, and cleared when it does not.

A new 'Don't show this again' checkbox has been added to the update_all warning dialog for a smoother workflow.

You can download the latest pre-release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is currently not available.

To properly support macOS builds and testing, a Mac device is needed.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
